all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
Now therefore be not grieved, nor angry with yourselves, that ye sold me hither: for God did send me before you to preserve life.
Genesis 45:5
Quote of the Day
"No matter where we live in the world, no matter our age, it is a basic human need … to feel a sense of belonging."
Sister J. Anette Dennis | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
